docs.title: "Decision: Pydantic AI over LangChain"
docs.excerpt: We chose Pydantic AI for the RAG agent instead of LangChain because it fits FastAPI naturally, has a far smaller surface area, and treats type safety as a first-class concern. The agent layer needed:

docs.title: "Feature: API Key Management"
docs.excerpt: Customers create and revoke API keys for the embeddable widget and programmatic access. Keys carry the `mrag_` prefix, are SHA-256 hashed at rest, and the management endpoints are intentionally JWT-on

docs.title: "Feature: Document Ingestion"
docs.excerpt: The pipeline that turns customer-uploaded documents into searchable chunks. Docling parses many formats into markdown, the HybridChunker splits on semantic boundaries, embeddings are generated in batc

docs.title: "Feature: RAG Agent"
docs.excerpt: The customer-facing chatbot. A Pydantic AI agent with hybrid-search tools that answers questions grounded in tenant documents. Exposed via `/api/v1/chat` with both streaming SSE and synchronous respon

docs.title: "Hybrid RRF Search"

docs.title: "Multi-Tenancy: Tenant Isolation"
